use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons that need to stand out with a premium, polished feel
Interactive UI elements requiring visual feedback through animated shine effects
Brand-forward buttons in applications using blue color schemes
ai_summary: A compact atomic button component featuring a blue gradient background with a horizontal shine sweep animation triggered on hover. The button includes a pseudo-element light streak that animates across the surface, combined with brightness adjustments for an interactive glow effect. Perfect for primary CTAs that need visual prominence without being visually overwhelming.
